heading: Report to Congress on future reorganization
label: 5819 Report to Congress on future reorganization
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was struck out by , , .Section 774(a)(4) of title 15Pub. L. 94–385, title I, § 109(a)(1)90 Stat. 1130Aug. 14, 1976
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was struck out by , , .Section 774(a)(4) of title 15Pub. L. 94–385, title I, § 109(a)(1)90 Stat. 1130Aug. 14, 1976

children.label: a
children.text: The President shall transmit to the Congress as promptly as possible, but not later than , such additional recommendations as he deems advisable for organization of energy and related functions in the Federal Government, including, but not limited to, whether or not there shall be established (1) a Department of Energy and Natural Resources, (2) an Energy Policy Council, and (3) a consolidation in whole or in part of regulatory functions concerning energy.June 30, 1975

children.label: b
children.text: This report shall replace and serve the purposes of the report required by section 774(a)(4) of title 15.1See References in Text note below.1
